scripts.clean:githead: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');for(const d of fs.readdirSync('packages',{withFileTypes:true}).filter(x=>x.isDirectory()).map(x=>x.name)){const p=path.join('packages',d,'package.json');if(!fs.existsSync(p)) continue;const raw=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/^\uFEFF/,'');const j=JSON.parse(raw);if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(j,'gitHead')){delete j.gitHead;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n');}}"
scripts.release:dry: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run pack:all
scripts.publish:all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/errors && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/protocol && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/core  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/server  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/cli  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/ais  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/sprite  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/api  && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/storage
scripts.pack:all: npm run clean:pack && npm run prepare:pack-dir && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/errors && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/protocol && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/storage && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/core && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/api && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/sprite && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/server && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/runtime && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/cli && npm pack --pack-destination .artifacts/npm ./packages/ais
scripts.build:server: tsc -b packages/server && cd webapp && npm run web:build
